posts.ig_caption:
Recovery isn't weakness. It's strategy.

The work doesn't finish when you leave the gym.
It finishes when you sleep.
When you hydrate.
When you take that rest day you keep skipping.

5 rules. Save this one.

🥊 Free Day Pass → link in bio

#DifferentBreed #EvolveIntoGreatness #TrainDifferent #RecoveryIsWork #NJFitness

posts.ig_caption:
Creatine isn't a steroid. It's the most-studied supplement on the planet.

The "weight gain" is water — pulled into your muscles, not your gut.
More reps. Heavier lifts.
3–5g daily. No loading phase needed.
Cutting? Still take it. Protect the muscle you earned.

5 truths. Save this one. Share it with the person who's still scared.

🥊 Free Day Pass → link in bio

#DifferentBreed #EvolveIntoGreatness #TrainDifferent #CreatineFacts #NJFitness

posts.ig_caption:

NEW Sat 8:15 AM · Sun 8 AM (Women Only) · Sun 10:30 AM

📲 Book → pilates.differentbreedsportsacademy.com

posts.ig_caption:
Something different is coming. 👀

THE COLISEUM — a new functional training ground at Different Breed.

Kettlebells. Battle ropes. Rogue sled. Dip bar. Chin-up bar. Resistance bands.

No machines. No mirrors. Just work.

Train like a gladiator. Welcome to the Coliseum.

Coming soon. Stay tuned. 🥊

#DifferentBreed #TheColiseum #TrainLikeAGladiator #EvolveIntoGreatness #NJFitness
posts.fb_caption: Something different is coming. 👀 THE COLISEUM — a new functional training ground at Different Breed. Kettlebells, ropes, sled, dip bar. No machines. No mirrors. Just work. Train like a gladiator. Coming soon. 🥊
posts.media_query: AI-GENERATED Veo 3 Fast footage — 4 clips composited in Remotion. Beats: sandaled foot on arena sand (A, 4s) → iron grip close-up (B, 8s) → slow aerial arena push-in (C, 8s) → backlit silhouette walk through archway (D, 8s). Custom ElevenLabs cinematic music track (music-coliseum-teaser.mp3). 22s total.
posts.notes: Coliseum Phase 1 teaser — approved by Joey Apr 16, scheduled for Fri Apr 17 @ 6pm ET. Source: Apr 15 meeting w/ Don. AI-generated Veo 3 Fast footage (~$3 total), composited in Remotion with centered text overlays per IG Reel safe-zone spec (v3 render), custom ElevenLabs Music generated trailer track. Message arc (Option B, user-selected): 'A new training ground is rising' → 'Raw iron / Real work / No machines' → 'The Coliseum · A Different Breed Experience' → 'Train like a gladiator / Welcome to the Coliseum / Coming soon'. No videographer credit — 100% synthetic. First of a phased campaign; Phase 2 (cross-cut AI + DB archive) planned for following week. Hashtag #TheColiseum seeded here for campaign tracking. Note: id remains '2026-04-19-001' for traceability to the original Apr 19 plan even though post_date moved up to 2026-04-17.

post_result.note: Upload initiated as scheduled post via Upload-Post --schedule flag. Will transition to 'completed' when it fires on Friday Apr 17 at 6pm ET. Polling was terminated early because scheduled posts stay in 'queued' until scheduled time, which would otherwise timeout the publisher loop.

Something new is rising at Different Breed.

We're building the Colosseum — a raw, functional training space. Sleds. Iron. A cold plunge. A heat tub in the back. Partly outdoors. No machines. Just movement.

Second new addition this year. First was the Pilates studio. Now this.

Coming soon. 2026.
